name: Case Management Activities
executiveSummary: Transforms adverse event information into actionable safety intelligence through systematic case processing, pattern recognition, and quality documentation.
aiIntegration: Natural language processing, pattern recognition, quality validation

name: Signal Management Activities
executiveSummary: Transforms data patterns into validated safety signals through sophisticated analytical approaches, multi-source integration, and stakeholder communication.
aiIntegration: Machine learning detection, predictive analytics, automated validation

name: Risk Management Activities
executiveSummary: Develops and implements targeted interventions that minimize medication risks while preserving therapeutic access, with emphasis on medication error prevention.
aiIntegration: Predictive risk modeling, effectiveness monitoring, behavioral analytics

name: Quality and Compliance Activities
executiveSummary: Ensures systematic quality across all pharmacovigilance processes through comprehensive compliance management, audit readiness, and continuous improvement.

name: Data and Technology Activities
executiveSummary: Leverages data analytics and AI capabilities to transform pharmacovigilance efficiency while maintaining data integrity and regulatory compliance.

name: Communication and Stakeholder Activities
executiveSummary: Creates and delivers impactful safety communications tailored to diverse audiences while building stakeholder trust and facilitating informed decision-making.

name: Research and Development Activities
executiveSummary: Conducts rigorous research that advances pharmacovigilance science through methodology development, evidence generation, and knowledge dissemination.

name: AI-Enhanced Pharmacovigilance Activities (Capstone)
executiveSummary: Represents the pinnacle achievement in AI-integrated pharmacovigilance practice, requiring EPA10 Level 4+ mastery and demonstrating comprehensive AI leadership across all domains.
